phrases.english: This means a lot, thank you.
Where can I find, the nearest store?
I am looking for, a souvenir.
Do you have, this in blue?
I'm truly sorry, please forgive me.
phrases.serbian: Zaista mi je žao, molim te oprosti mi.
phrases.transliteration: Zai-sta mi je zao, mo-lim te opros-ti mi.

phrases.serbian: Hajde da ovo ostavimo iza nas, važi?
phrases.transliteration: Haj-de da o-vo os-tav-i-mo i-za nas, va-zi?

phrases.english: I hope you can forgive me.
phrases.serbian: Nadam se da mi možeš oprostiti.
phrases.transliteration: Na-dam se da mi mo-zhes opros-ti-ti.

phrases.english: It was my mistake, I apologize.
Help! I need a doctor, please.
phrases.serbian: У помоћ! Треба ми лекар, молим.
phrases.transliteration: U pomoc! Treba mi lekar, molim.

phrases.english: I am lost, can you help?
phrases.serbian: Изгубио/изгубила сам се, можете ли помоћи?
phrases.transliteration: Izgubio/izgubila sam se, mozete li pomoci?

phrases.english: Little by little, you'll get there.
Practice makes perfect, keep it up.

phrases.serbian: Svaka reč je bitna, slušaj pažljivo.
phrases.transliteration: Svaka rech je bitna, slushaj pazhljivo.

phrases.serbian: Tvoj glas je važan, izgovori ga.
phrases.transliteration: Tvoj glas je važan, izgovori ga.

phrases.english: Don't fear mistakes, learn from them.
phrases.serbian: Ne boj se grešaka, uči iz njih.
phrases.transliteration: Ne boj se grešaka, uči iz njih.

phrases.serbian: Смеј се често, смеј се гласно.
phrases.transliteration: Smej se često, smej se glasno.

phrases.english: You are stronger, than you think.
Take a deep breath, then go.

phrases.serbian: Ti si moj najbolji prijatelj, uvek.
phrases.transliteration: Ti si moj najbolji prijatelj, uvek.

phrases.english: Our aunt, she likes to travel.

phrases.serbian: Moj brat od tetke, ona je pametna.
phrases.transliteration: Moy brat od tetke, ona ye pametna.

phrases.serbian: Стани усправно, суочи се са светом.
phrases.transliteration: Stani uspravno, suoči se sa svetom.

phrases.english: I love you, more each day.
phrases.serbian: Volim te, sve više svaki dan.
phrases.transliteration: Vo-lim te, sve vi-she sva-ki dan.

phrases.english: You can do this, breathe deep.

phrases.serbian: Сачекај и види, шта ће бити.
phrases.transliteration: Sačekaj i vidi, šta će biti.

phrases.english: You make me laugh, a lot.

phrases.serbian: Drago mi je, što si tu, prijatelju.
phrases.transliteration: Drago mi je, što si tu, prijatelju.

phrases.english: Each lesson, a new door opens.
phrases.serbian: Svaka lekcija, otvara se nova vrata.
phrases.transliteration: Svaka lekcija, otvara se nova vrata.

phrases.english: Your voice, getting stronger each day.
Embrace the challenge, find your rhythm.
From single words, a story unfolds.
phrases.serbian: Od reči do reči, priča se razvija.
phrases.transliteration: Od reči do reči, priča se razvija.

phrases.english: My heart aches, please let go.
phrases.serbian: Srce me boli, molim te, pusti.
phrases.transliteration: Srce me boli, molim te, pusti.

phrases.english: Let peace be our guide now.
phrases.serbian: Neka mir bude naš vodič sada.
phrases.transliteration: Neka mir bude naš vodič sada.

phrases.english: I release the past, with you.
I have a question, for you.

phrases.serbian: Уложи у снове, не у сумње.
phrases.transliteration: Ulozhi u snove, ne u sumnje.

phrases.english: Plan your money, own your future.
Breathe in peace, breathe out worries.
Feel the moment, let it flow.
Could you recommend, a local dish?
Where can I find, good coffee?
I'm looking for, a quiet street.
Unlock the rhythm, of Serbian words.
A new language, a new world awaits.
Listen closely, the sounds will guide you.
phrases.serbian: Slušaj pažljivo, zvukovi će te voditi.

phrases.english: Embrace the challenge, find your fluency.
Sing your heart out, loud and clear.
phrases.serbian: Pevaj iz srca, glasno i jasno.
phrases.transliteration: Pevay eez sertsah, glasno ee yasno.

phrases.english: Listen to the rhythm, feel the beat.
Dance like nobody's watching, truly free.
phrases.serbian: Igraj kao niko ne gleda, potpuno slobodno.
phrases.transliteration: Eegra y kao neeko ne gledah, potpoono slobodyno.

phrases.english: Play that melody, a sweet refrain.
Hum a happy tune, all day long.
The cat, sleeps on the mat.
A dog, barks at the door.
The horse, runs through the field.
Sunrise paints the sky, a new day begins.
phrases.serbian: Sunce boji nebo, nov dan počinje.
phrases.transliteration: Sun-tse bo-yi ne-bo, nov dan po-chi-nye.

phrases.english: Stretch, yawn, and greet the morning.
phrases.serbian: Protegni se, zevaj, i pozdravi jutro.
phrases.transliteration: Pro-teg-ni se, ze-vay, i poz-dra-vi yu-tro.

phrases.english: First coffee, then conquer the world.
Open mind, open heart, open world.
phrases.serbian: Otvoren um, otvoreno srce, otvoren svet.
phrases.transliteration: Otvoren um, otvoreno srce, otvoren svet.

phrases.english: Listen to silence, learn its lessons.
Taste the rakija, feel the warmth.
The music plays, the kolo spins.
Burek for breakfast, a daily joy.
A smile, a greeting, hospitality's start.
Listen to the silence, within you.
The present moment, is all there is.
phrases.serbian: Sadašnji trenutak, je sve što postoji.
phrases.transliteration: Sah-dahsh-nee tren-oo-tak, yeh sveh sh'toh poh-stoy-ee.

phrases.english: Flow like water, find your way.
phrases.serbian: Teci kao voda, nađi svoj put.
phrases.transliteration: Teh-tsee kah-oh voh-dah, nah-dzee svoy poot.

phrases.english: Your true north, guides you home.
phrases.serbian: Tvoj pravi sever, vodi te kući.
phrases.transliteration: Tvoy prah-vee seh-ver, voh-dee teh koo-chee.

phrases.english: Comforting tea, quiet evening, inner calm.
phrases.serbian: Utešan čaj, mirno veče, unutrašnji mir.
phrases.transliteration: Utešan čaj, mirno veče, unutrašnji mir.

phrases.english: Dancing freely, singing loudly, feeling alive.
phrases.serbian: Plešem slobodno, pevam glasno, osećam se živim.
phrases.transliteration: Plesem slobodno, pevam glasno, osećam se živim.

phrases.english: A good book, a cozy corner, pure contentment.
phrases.serbian: Dobra knjiga, udoban kutak, čisto zadovoljstvo.
phrases.transliteration: Dobra knjiga, udoban kutak, čisto zadovoljstvo.

phrases.english: Discover Serbian soul, one word at a time.
phrases.serbian: Otkrijte srpsku dušu, reč po reč.
phrases.transliteration: Otkrijte srpsku dušu, reč po reč.

phrases.english: Explore rich history, with new words.
Taste Serbian life, one phrase daily.
Can you direct me, to safety?
phrases.serbian: Možete li me uputiti, na sigurno?
phrases.transliteration: Mo-zheh-teh lee meh oo-poo-tee-tee, nah see-goor-no?

phrases.serbian: Veoma mi je teško, da dišem.
phrases.transliteration: Veh-o-ma mee yeh tehsh-ko, da dee-shem.

phrases.english: Is there anyone, who speaks English?
phrases.serbian: Ima li iko, ko govori engleski?
phrases.transliteration: Ee-ma lee ee-ko, ko go-vo-ree eng-les-kee?

phrases.serbian: Fokusirajte se sada, na ovaj cilj.
phrases.transliteration: Fokusirajte se sada, na ovaj cilj.

phrases.english: She's like a sister to me.
Speak from the heart, speak Serbian.

phrases.serbian: Vaš glas je bitan, na srpskom.
phrases.transliteration: Vash glas je bitan, na srpskom.
